metadata.name: confidential_desk
metadata.description: Confidential Lending Desk — private positions on PER, settlement on base

instructions.name: deposit_collateral_espl
docs: CPI into MagicBlock ephemeral SPL token program (optional path when global vault exists).

accounts.name: espl_vault_meta
docs: Global vault metadata PDA for collateral mint.

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: SPL token account holding pooled funds for this mint.

types.name: DeskLedger
docs: Pool accounting kept on PER (delegated); not stored on L1 `DeskConfig`.

fields.name: lp_total_minted
docs: Mirrors LP supply as seen on PER for share math without reading SPL mint on ER.

fields.name: deposit_amount
docs: USDC atoms notionally supplied (mirrors vault share accounting on PER).

types.name: SettlementTicket
docs: Bridging PER approval to base-layer SPL. After `commit_ticket`, fields are visible on L1.

fields.name: owner
docs: Borrower or lender who initiated the flow.

fields.name: secondary_amount
docs: For liquidation: liquidator pays `secondary_amount` (debt) to borrow_vault, receives `amount` collateral.
